## Description / Excerpt

A cross-scale systems essay on feedback, control overload, dissipation, suffering, society, AI, and consent as alignment under constraint.

Excerpt:

## Abstract Across physics, biology, psychology, societies, and emerging AI systems, the same pattern recurs: systems collapse not because they fail to adapt, but because adaptation is demanded through control rather than alignment. This essay develops a universal systems lens—gr
